WITH base_raw AS (
  SELECT
    "time",
    "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_x"::double precision AS x,
    "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_y"::double precision AS y,
    "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_z"::double precision AS z
  FROM public.data
  WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
    AND device IN (${Device:sqlstring})
    AND "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_x" IS NOT NULL
    AND "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_y" IS NOT NULL
    AND "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_z" IS NOT NULL
),
raw_with_mag AS (
  SELECT *, sqrt(x*x + y*y + z*z) AS mag
  FROM base_raw
),
mag_stats AS (
  SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mag) AS mag_median
  FROM raw_with_mag
),
base AS (
  SELECT r.*
  FROM raw_with_mag r
  CROSS JOIN mag_stats s
  WHERE r.mag BETWEEN s.mag_median * 0.85 AND s.mag_median * 1.15
),
g AS (
  SELECT
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY x) AS gx,
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY y) AS gy,
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY z) AS gz
  FROM base
),
up_axis AS (
  SELECT gx, gy, gz, sqrt(gx*gx + gy*gy + gz*gz) AS gnorm
  FROM g
),
frame0 AS (
  SELECT
    gx, gy, gz,
    -gx / NULLIF(gnorm,0) AS upx,
    -gy / NULLIF(gnorm,0) AS upy,
    -gz / NULLIF(gnorm,0) AS upz
  FROM up_axis
),
ref_axis AS (
  SELECT *,
    CASE WHEN abs(upx) < 0.9 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END AS rx,
    CASE WHEN abs(upx) < 0.9 THEN 0.0 ELSE 1.0 END AS ry,
    0.0 AS rz
  FROM frame0
),
h1_pre AS (
  SELECT *,
    (ry*upz - rz*upy) AS h1x0,
    (rz*upx - rx*upz) AS h1y0,
    (rx*upy - ry*upx) AS h1z0
  FROM ref_axis
),
frame AS (
  SELECT
    gx, gy, gz, upx, upy, upz,
    h1x0 / NULLIF(sqrt(h1x0*h1x0 + h1y0*h1y0 + h1z0*h1z0),0) AS h1x,
    h1y0 / NULLIF(sqrt(h1x0*h1x0 + h1y0*h1y0 + h1z0*h1z0),0) AS h1y,
    h1z0 / NULLIF(sqrt(h1x0*h1x0 + h1y0*h1y0 + h1z0*h1z0),0) AS h1z
  FROM h1_pre
),
frame2 AS (
  SELECT
    gx, gy, gz, upx, upy, upz, h1x, h1y, h1z,
    (upy*h1z - upz*h1y) AS h2x,
    (upz*h1x - upx*h1z) AS h2y,
    (upx*h1y - upy*h1x) AS h2z
  FROM frame
),
proj AS (
  SELECT
    ((b.x - f.gx)*f.h1x + (b.y - f.gy)*f.h1y + (b.z - f.gz)*f.h1z) AS h1,
    ((b.x - f.gx)*f.h2x + (b.y - f.gy)*f.h2y + (b.z - f.gz)*f.h2z) AS h2,
    ((b.x - f.gx)*f.upx + (b.y - f.gy)*f.upy + (b.z - f.gz)*f.upz) AS up
  FROM base b
  CROSS JOIN frame2 f
),
counts AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT count(*) FROM raw_with_mag) AS n_raw,
    (SELECT count(*) FROM base) AS n_used,
    (SELECT mag_median FROM mag_stats) AS mag_median
)
SELECT
  c.n_raw,
  c.n_used,
  round(100.0 * c.n_used / NULLIF(c.n_raw,0), 1) AS pct_kept,
  c.mag_median,
  sqrt(avg(p.h1*p.h1)) AS rms_h1,
  sqrt(avg(p.h2*p.h2)) AS rms_h2,
  sqrt(avg(p.up*p.up)) AS rms_up,
  sqrt(avg(p.h1*p.h1) + avg(p.h2*p.h2)) AS rms_horizontal,
  sqrt(avg(p.up*p.up)) / NULLIF(sqrt(avg(p.h1*p.h1) + avg(p.h2*p.h2)),0) AS up_to_horizontal_ratio
FROM proj p
CROSS JOIN counts c
GROUP BY c.n_raw, c.n_used, c.mag_median;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_x"::double precision AS x,
    "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_y"::double precision AS y,
    "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_z"::double precision AS z
  FROM public.data
  WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
    AND device IN (${Device:sqlstring})
    AND "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_x" IS NOT NULL
    AND "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_y" IS NOT NULL
    AND "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_z" IS NOT NULL
),
center_vals AS (
  SELECT
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY x) AS cx,
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY y) AS cy,
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY z) AS cz
  FROM base
),
proj AS (
  SELECT
    (b.x - c.cx) AS up_x,
    (b.y - c.cy) AS h_y,
    (b.z - c.cz) AS h_z
  FROM base b
  CROSS JOIN center_vals c
)
SELECT
  sqrt(avg(up_x * up_x)) AS rms_up,
  sqrt(avg(h_y * h_y + h_z * h_z)) AS rms_horizontal,
  sqrt(avg(up_x * up_x)) / NULLIF(sqrt(avg(h_y * h_y + h_z * h_z)), 0) AS up_to_horizontal_ratio,
  CASE
    WHEN sqrt(avg(up_x * up_x)) / NULLIF(sqrt(avg(h_y * h_y + h_z * h_z)), 0) > 1
      THEN 'vertical-dominant'
    ELSE 'sideways-dominant'
  END AS interpretation
FROM proj;

  "decoded_payload_hermon_accelerometer_0_y"::double precision AS y,

list.definition:
WITH device_map(short_id, label) AS (
  VALUES
    ('hermon-00', 'hermon-00-Pavlos'),
    ('hermon-01', 'hermon-01-pneymatiko'),
    ('hermon-02', 'hermon-02-pyrgosDimarxeiou'),
    ('hermon-03', 'hermon-03-roloi'),
    ('hermon-04', 'hermon-04-lazareta'),
    ('hermon-05', 'hermon-05-dimarxio'),
    ('hermon-06', 'hermon-06-peykakia'),
    ('hermon-07', 'hermon-07-timAmpela'),
    ('hermon-08', 'hermon-08-ydras'),
    ('hermon-09', 'hermon-09-ladopoulos'),
    ('test_http', 'test_http')
)
SELECT
  label    AS "__text",
  short_id AS "__value"
FROM device_map
ORDER BY 1;
list.name: Device
list.query:
WITH device_map(short_id, label) AS (
  VALUES
    ('hermon-00', 'hermon-00-Pavlos'),
    ('hermon-01', 'hermon-01-pneymatiko'),
    ('hermon-02', 'hermon-02-pyrgosDimarxeiou'),
    ('hermon-03', 'hermon-03-roloi'),
    ('hermon-04', 'hermon-04-lazareta'),
    ('hermon-05', 'hermon-05-dimarxio'),
    ('hermon-06', 'hermon-06-peykakia'),
    ('hermon-07', 'hermon-07-timAmpela'),
    ('hermon-08', 'hermon-08-ydras'),
    ('hermon-09', 'hermon-09-ladopoulos'),
    ('test_http', 'test_http')
)
SELECT
  label    AS "__text",
  short_id AS "__value"
FROM device_map
ORDER BY 1;
